name: Courses — Visitor can view course details and registration CTA
description: Verifies that a visitor can navigate from the courses listing to a specific course page, view its details, and find the registration CTA.

planSteps.description: Click on the course titled 'الماجستير المهني في إدارة الموارد البشرية' to view its details
Verify that the course detail page loads, displaying the title 'الماجستير المهني في إدارة الموارد البشرية' prominently in the hero section
Verify that a registration or enrollment CTA button (e.g., 'نموذج التسجيل') is clearly visible on the page
